# Parsa Ghaei - Site Guide for AI Assistants

Site: https://parsaghaei.dev
Prompts: https://prompts.parsaghaei.dev

## Primary Pages
- Home: https://parsaghaei.dev/
- Blog and Devlog: https://parsaghaei.dev/blog
- Prompt Library: https://prompts.parsaghaei.dev/

## Scope
- Personal portfolio content
- Blog and devlog posts pulled from Medium
- Curated AI prompt library

## Canonical URLs
- Use https://parsaghaei.dev for main portfolio pages
- Use https://prompts.parsaghaei.dev for prompt library pages
